SEARCH
Package net.boricj.bft.elf.sections

Class ElfSymbolTable.ElfSymbol

java.lang.Object
net.boricj.bft.elf.sections.ElfSymbolTable.ElfSymbol
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<ElfSymbolTable.ElfSymbol>
Enclosing class:
ElfSymbolTable
public class ElfSymbolTable.ElfSymbol extends Object implements Comparable<ElfSymbolTable.ElfSymbol>
An ELF symbol table entry. Represents a named entity with type, binding, visibility, and value information.

  • Constructor Summary

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
    protected
    ElfSymbol(String name, long st_value, long st_size, ElfSymbolType type, ElfSymbolVisibility visibility, ElfSymbolBinding binding, short st_shndx)
    Creates a new symbol entry.

    Checks if this is a null symbol (undefined symbol at index 0).

  • Constructor Details

    • ElfSymbol

      protected ElfSymbol(String name, long st_value, long st_size, ElfSymbolType type, ElfSymbolVisibility visibility, ElfSymbolBinding binding, short st_shndx)
      Creates a new symbol entry.
      Parameters:
      name - symbol name
      st_value - symbol value (address or offset)
      st_size - symbol size in bytes
      type - symbol type
      visibility - symbol visibility
      binding - symbol binding
      st_shndx - section index

  • Method Details

    • write

      protected void write(DataOutput dataOutput, ElfClass ident_class) throws IOException
      Writes this symbol entry to output.
      Parameters:
      dataOutput - data output to write to
      ident_class - ELF class (32-bit or 64-bit)
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs
